updateNote: Day 56 5:16 AM PT refresh: Brent surges to $107.14 (+34.3% from pre-war). WTI $97.40 (+29.0%). Only 5 ships transit Hormuz in 24 hours — lowest since blockade began. IDF drone shot down over Tyre by Hezbollah. IDF kills Hezbollah operative near Kounine — first post-ceasefire targeted strike. Netanyahu reveals prostate cancer — declared cancer-free. Araghchi heading to Islamabad for potential Round 2 talks. Hegseth: blockade 'growing and going global.' OFAC sanctions 14 entities. Iran unity statement rejects Trump division claims. Guterres welcomes ceasefire extension. Gas $4.031.
